_meta.notes: Tours section rebuilt (15 tours: 5 Viator / 5 GetYourGuide / 5 TripAdvisor). Viator ratings/reviews pulled live this build via Viator MCP (search_experiences + get_experience_details). TripAdvisor entries cross-referenced to their matching Viator product listings for ratings (same product / shared review pool) and confirmed live on the TripAdvisor product pages via site: search-result inspection. GetYourGuide: t38942 (4.7/727) and t15599 (4.6/628) confirmed fresh via rich-snippet inspection this build; t73531 / t304558 / t378369 ratings carried from the turin_v13 booking-grounded verification (2026-05-07/14, within the 90-day window) - GYG gates live ratings behind its JS widget which is undrivable in-session (web_fetch returns an empty client-rendered shell). See To_Do_List Questions for Dani.
